canonical_role: Asset generation, certification, budget governance, and controlled Spatial promotion service.
exact_pr_head: Recorded in pull request metadata after this receipt update to avoid a self-referential commit hash.
implemented_controls: All remote action references in canonical-version-forge.yml are immutable 40-character commit SHAs.
The paid forge verifies workflow_dispatch, refs/heads/main, the exact checked-out Asset Factory SHA, and a clean checkout before dependency installation or provider configuration use.

Spatial promotion records the exact main SHA, rechecks the remote main SHA before creating the branch, verifies the promotion commit parent, records the base SHA in the PR body, and never auto-merges.
A no-secret exact-candidate workflow rejects mutable action references or removal of critical paid-forge controls.

runner_evidence.workaround: The platform-neutral, no-secret integrity gate uses macos-latest until ubuntu-latest assignment recovers. Linux build and test gates remain unchanged and blocked.

permissions.cross_repository_promotion: Uses URAI_WHEEL_GITHUB_TOKEN only when promote=true; repository/environment scope remains externally verifiable.

budget_impact: None. This change performs no provider request and changes no authorized monetary ceiling.
runtime_impact: Paid generation behavior is unchanged except for fail-closed source verification and promotion defaulting to disabled.
license_impact: No dependency, asset license, attribution, or lockfile content changed.
